description_long: This bungalow features a broad, low-pitched hip roof with gray shingles and a prominent central gable. The exterior walls are clad in brown siding, complemented by white-trimmed windows and doors. A small, covered porch with white railings is visible at the front, providing a welcoming entryway. Multiple large windows line the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The structure sits on a raised foundation with a short set of steps leading to the porch. The surrounding area includes a patch of green lawn and signage, suggesting a residential or display context.
description: A brown, single-story bungalow with a wide hip roof, white-trimmed windows, and a small covered porch at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with white railings, and large front windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof, side windows, and a small staircase leading to a secondary entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows and the back porch area, with the roof's hip structure clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring signage, the side lawn, and the continuation of the hip roof and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
